privileged_info_summary: The 'Big Five Personality Traits.csv' dataset is real data sourced from the JASP Data Library. Based on programmatic verification of the CSV file, the true mean of the new 'Plasticity' variable (calculated as the average of 'Extraversion' and 'Openness') is ~3.540. The true Pearson correlation r between 'Plasticity' and 'Agreeableness' is ~0.133, with a true p-value of ~0.0029. The data is pre-placed at '/home/ga/Documents/JASP/BigFivePersonalityTraits.csv'.
